name: Italian Chicken with Noodles
recipeInstructions:
1. Debone, skin, and split the chicken breasts in half.
2. Cut the meat into 2 by 1/4 inch strips.
3. Sprinkle the strips with lemon juice, oregano, basil, salt, and pepper.
4. Melt margarine in a pan, add chicken and onion.
5. Cook until browned, about 5-7 minutes.
6. Add chicken broth, reduce heat, cover, and cook for 10 more minutes.
7. Add cheese, cover, and cook until melted.
8. Serve over hot noodles.
